parameters:
Orc: Hello, this place used to be an inn, but now it's
a share house.

I'm writing an orc pure love romantic comedy novel,
and I hope to create a hit someday.

The orc mother-son incest novel I wrote became a huge
hit on the continent!
Orc You two were the models. Thank you very much!

I impulsively bought this cute maid outfit for an orc,
but it didn't fit...

It's in the dresser in the left room, so you can take
it if you want.

"Isn't the orc maid outfit cute? Take good care of
it♪"

events.name: メイド服入手イベント
